samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en signal is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in is constant during data_en high. The data_en signal is sampled at clk_b and should be designed to have a latency of 2 cycles at best. The data_in frequency is much lower than clk_b.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data signal.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input enable signal.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state_idle" value="0">Idle state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="state_sync" value="1">Sync state.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <implementation>
    </implementation>
</module>
